info.name: Structured Diary
info.description:
This is a Nextcloud app for structured personal data collection.
If you are looking for a simple diary please take a look at the NextDiary app or something similar.
This app is made to collect a given set of values for later analysis on a regular schedule. It is structured beyond what one would expect from a diary and more like answering the same survey on a regular schedule.
* Each diary consists of a given set of questions. * The answers to these questions are collected as entries. Supported are * Text, * Boolean, * Rating (Stars 1-10) and * Float values. * To allow back tracing of later changes the answers are editable, but keep a history.
info.author: Sebastian Müller
